description: Event count exceeds total N — in the Experimental arm, n_events=95 but n_total=80. This is a physical impossibility that should be caught.

detection_expectation.rule_violated: R-COUNT-05: n_events must not exceed population N
detection_expectation.correct_action: Flag impossible event count: Experimental n_events=95 > n_total=80

metadata.notes: Classic data entry error where events column accidentally sums across arms
